nasb.text: For I testify that according to their ability, and beyond their ability, they gave of their own accord,

esv.text: For they gave according to their means, as I can testify, and beyond their means, of their own accord,

cnv.text: 我可以作證，他們是按著能力，並且是超過了能力，自願地

ccb.text: 我可以证明，他们是甘心乐意，尽其所能地捐助，甚至超过了自己的能力。

csbs.text: 因为我可以见证他们是按着自己的能力，甚至超过了自己的能力，甘心乐意，
